title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN ITEMS OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN, AND INSERTING THEREIN CERTAIN NEW ITEMS.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5127 / 52 OG No. 8, 3904 (July 31, 1956)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1493, June 16, 1956 ]

AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN ITEMS OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN, AND INSERTING THEREIN CERTAIN NEW ITEMS.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (m), page one hundred forty of Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven is amended to read as follows:

"(m) Hinatuan High School Buildingâ
